name: Hisu Mori Toride (Unicorn Clan)
text: Reaction: After you win a [mil] conflict with more participating characters than your opponent, bow this stronghold and sacrifice a (friendly) Cavalry character – you may declare an additional [mil] conflict this phase.

name: Magistrate Station
text: Action: Choose an honored character – ready that character.

name: Web of Lies
text: X is equal to twice the bid on your honor dial.

name: Yasuki Broker
text: While this character is participating in a conflict, each character you control gains courtesy and sincerity.

name: Tengu Sensei
text:
Covert.
Reaction: After this character chooses a character using covert – that character cannot be declared as an attacker this phase.

name: Agasha Shunsen
text: Action: During a conflict, return 1 or more rings you have claimed to the unclaimed ring pool. Choose a character you control – search your conflict deck for an attachment with printed cost equal to or lower than the number of rings returned and attach it to that character. Shuffle.

name: Kitsu Warrior
text:
For each [mil] ring that is claimed, this character gets +2[mil].
For each [pol] ring that is claimed, this character gets +2[pol].

name: Reader of Omens
text: This character gets +3[pol] while you have claimed the [air] or [void] ring.

name: Reclusive Zokujin
text: During [earth] conflicts, this character gains covert and is immune to enemy card effects.

name: Minami Kaze Regulars
text:
No attachments except Weapon.
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict in which you have more participating characters than your opponent – gain 1 fate and draw 1 card.

name: Mantis Tenkinja
text:
Water role only.
Interrupt: When you play an event, lose 1 honor – reduce the cost of that event by 1.

name: Awakened Tsukumogami
text:
Void role only.
You may use fate on a ring to pay the cost of a conflict card that has a Trait that matches an element of that ring.

name: Pragmatism
text:
Attach to a character you control.
While you are less honorable than an opponent, attached character gets +1[mil], +1[pol], and gains: "This character cannot be honored or dishonored."

name: Specialized Defenses
text:
Earth role only.
Action: During a conflict, if the attacked province has an element that matches the contested ring or a ring in your claimed ring pool – double that province's strength until the end of the conflict.

name: Being and Becoming
text:
Void role only. Attach to a character you control.
Action: Bow attached character, choose an unclaimed ring – move each fate from that ring to attached character.

name: Mantra of Earth
text: Reaction: After an opponent declares a [earth] conflict, choose a Monk character or a character with a Monk attachment – until the end of the conflict, opponents' card abilities cannot choose that character as a target. Draw 1 card.

name: Restored Heirloom
text:
Water role only. Restricted.
Interrupt: When you would resolve the [water] ring effect, choose a character you control – instead of resolving normal ring effects, put this attachment into play from your hand or conflict discard pile, attached to that character.

name: Roving Michibiku
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – take a ring from the defending player's claimed ring pool.

name: Taryū-Jiai
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a Shugenja character you control and a Shugenja character controlled by an opponent – your character challenges your opponent's character to a glory duel. The winner of the duel's controller resolves a ring effect of his or her choice as if he or she was the attacking player.

name: Unleash the Djinn
text:
Fire role only.
Action: During a conflict, lose 3 honor – set the [mil] and [pol] skill of each participating character to 3 until the end of the conflict.
